top_signals.title: Aluminum Slumps as Iran Peace Deal Softens Blow of Supply Crisis
top_signals.summary: Aluminum slumped to a two-month low as a peace deal between the US and Iran laid the groundwork for the resumption of metal shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Few months, even a year: Energy prices to remain elevated on US-Iran deal

top_signals.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial to fund UFC fighter bonuses in USD1 stablecoin at White House event
top_signals.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: I was defence secretary, here’s how we fund our armed forces
top_signals.summary: There is a way to attract more capital investment – whether it is the better utilisation of MoD assets, or attracting capital from pension funds to invest in other priorities like NHS hospitals to meet the knock-on impacts of getting to 3.5 per cent of GDP on defence, says Lord Hutton It’s easy to be [...]
